'''thachozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanobenzoate|cyanobenzoate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanobenzoate|cyanobenzoate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thachozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæchezeth|thæchezeth]] || [[word:thæchezej|thæchezej]] || [[word:thæchezesh|thæchezesh]] || [[word:thæcheze|thæcheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachochozoth|thachochozoth]] || [[word:thachochozoj|thachochozoj]] || [[word:thachochozosh|thachochozosh]] || [[word:thachochozo|thachochozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachozoth|thachozoth]] || [[word:thachozoj|thachozoj]] || [[word:thachozosh|thachozosh]] || [[word:thachozo|thachozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachofzoth|thachofzoth]] || [[word:thachofzoj|thachofzoj]] || [[word:thachofzosh|thachofzosh]] || [[word:thachofzof|thachofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thachozotho|thachozotho]] || [[word:thachozojo|thachozojo]] || [[word:thachozosho|thachozosho]] || [[word:thachozoko|thachozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thachozoth|thachozoth]] || [[word:thachozoj|thachozoj]] || [[word:thachozosh|thachozosh]] || [[word:thachozo|thachozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thachozothol|thachozothol]] || [[word:thachozojol|thachozojol]] || [[word:thachozoshol|thachozoshol]] || [[word:thachozokol|thachozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thachozothotho|thachozothotho]] || [[word:thachozojojo|thachozojojo]] || [[word:thachozoshosho|thachozoshosho]] || [[word:thachozoko|thachozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thachozothon|thachozothon]] || [[word:thachozojon|thachozojon]] || [[word:thachozoshon|thachozoshon]] || [[word:thachozokon|thachozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thachozothoro|thachozothoro]] || [[word:thachozojoro|thachozojoro]] || [[word:thachozoshoro|thachozoshoro]] || [[word:thachozokoro|thachozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
